creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=fe79f4dae89f71ea5938c491e91901fd6198a869

commit fe79f4dae89f71ea5938c491e91901fd6198a869
Author:     Vidar Karlsen <vidar@karlsen.tech>
AuthorDate: 2023-01-24 11:04:34 +0000
Commit:     Nuno Teixeira <eduardo@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-01-24 11:06:18 +0000

    sysutils/p5-File-Rename: Update to 2.01

    Changes upstream:
    - min perl version 5.8.0
    - use warnings
    - use Getopt::Long 2.24
    - move rename source file to source/ - to avoid rename being found when
      @INC includes '.'
    - Revert regex for $INC values
    - Initialize C<our $print> for v5.10

    Changes to the port:
    - Added DOS2UNIX to clean up bin/rename

    ChangeLog:      https://metacpan.org/dist/File-Rename/changes
    PR:             269094

 sysutils/p5-File-Rename/Makefile | 5 +++--
 sysutils/p5-File-Rename/distinfo | 6 +++---
 2 files changed, 6 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)
